feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I am facing error while deploying Salesforce Adapter
entry.content: I am trying to deploy salesforce adapter on my trail account but facing issue, can anyone help me to resolve it.

entry.title: Parallel multicast to broadcast messages to multiple systems
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have one interface in SAP PO which sends messages to eight partner systems at a time.

Currently if we migrate the interfaces to SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration) , we have the idea to use parallel Multicast pallet option to broadcast the messages to multiple partner systems at a time. But, if we use multicast option then if due to some reason one of the partner system is down, technical connection issue to that partner system (authentication, Firewall issue etc.,).. then all the messages that are supposed to be processed for other partner systems also get stuck in Cloud Integration because of the issue due to one of the partner system. Could you please let us know what is the alternate option available instead of "Parallel Multicast" pallet option in Cloud Integration? Thank you!

Regards,

Ramu.

entry.title: Does anyone know what the rules are for inclusion, to overcome this error?
entry.content: I have the same error when activating the booster, but I have not been successful in solving it. Does anyone know the rules to include to unlock this problem?

entry.title: CPI: API has restriction to pull only 100 records in each call
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


There is a source system and source system is exposing an API and CPI needs to get the data from source system and send it to target system(some third party). But they are some restrictions defined in the source system API level to pick the data.
1st restriction is it can give only 100 records in a call not more than that.
2nd restriction is sender API itself can be called only once per minute.
but i have close to 10k records from source application which needs to transfered to target application.

Please explain how to achieve this in CPI level? it would great helpful if you answer.

entry.title: Infotype 0001An exception with the type CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE occurred, but was neither handle
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am currently implementing BIB replication (EC to ERP)

However while testing the replication is error out.

Currently testing for existing employees.

Infotype 0001An exception with the type CX_SY_DYN_CALL_ILLEGAL_TYPE occurred, but was neither handled locally, nor declared in a RAISING clause

Message no. ECPAO_IN_PROCESSING055

Pernr XXXXXXXX : Infotype 0001 with error.

Message no. ECPAO_IN_PROCESSING077

Can any one provide a resolution.

I additionally checked below notes, however existing feature for VSKSI is PME25

https://me.sap.com/notes/3276951/E

https://me.sap.com/notes/3464874/E

Thanks

entry.title: Is there any variable to be changed to increase the timeout from 2min when Autosys triggers the BTP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

Autosys(powershell script) scheduler is timing out in 2 minutes, but the iFlow keep running as long as it is required to complete the processing. While we are checking other possible options, we need to send a ticket to SAP soon to get where this is being configured, from what we know it is not iFlow level configuration.

We tried the following steps:

  • We tried running powershell script directly(skipping autosys), noticed it is getting timeout in 2 mins
  • We tried to invoking CPI endpoint directly from postman(skipping autosys and powershell), it is also getting timeout in 2 mins
  • We created scheduler iflow with in BTP and invoked main flow. There is no timeout happening in scheduler iFlow

 

Is there any variable to be changed to increase the timeout from 2min when Autosys triggers the BTP iflow?

Thanks,

Himani

entry.title: CPI: Messages are failing due to mapping issue and connectivity issues
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement in CPI where the messages are failing due to mapping issue/data issue and connectivity issues with receiver system.

So here if the messages failed due to mapping exception, please let me know how to handle this?

if the messages are failed due to connectivity issue,  how to handle this failures?

It will be very helpful if you can suggest me on this.

Thanks much

entry.title: Java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out While connecting to outlook account
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to read email from an outlook account using mail adapter in SAP CPI/CI. While deploying it is giving error as: 

[CONTENT][CONTENT_DEPLOY][InstanceError] : {"message":"POLL_FAILED","parameters":["imaps://outlook.office365.com:993?binding=%23binding_MessageFlow_635&connectionTimeout=3000&delete=false&disconnect=true&fetchSize=20&folderName=Inbox&handleFailedMessage=true&mail.imap.auth.digest-md5.disable=true&mail.imap.auth.ntlm.disable=true&mail.imap.auth.xoauth2.disable=true&mail.imap.partialfetch=false&mail.imaps.partialfetch=false&maxMessagesPerPoll=20&mimeDecodeHeaders=true&peek=true&pollStrategy=%23mailPollStrategy_MessageFlow_635&scheduler=MessageFlow_635.pollConsumerScheduler&scheduler.cron=0+0%2F1+0-23+%3F+*+*+*&scheduler.timeZone=Etc%2FGMT&unseen=true"],"childMessageInstances":[{"message":"EXCEPTION","parameters":["javax.mail.MessagingException: * BYE JavaMail Exception: java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out (local port 51856 to address 10.158.235.175 (551ab33c-9aa4-45b0-69c2-227d), remote port 993 to address 52.97.135.98)"],"childMessageInstances":[{"message":"CAUSE","parameters":["com.sun.mail.iap.ConnectionException: * BYE JavaMail Exception: java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Read timed out (local port 51856 to address 10.158.235.175 (551ab33c-9aa4-45b0-69c2-227d), remote port 993 to address 52.97.135.98)"]}]}]}

Please help to analyze this error.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Mayank

entry.title: SAP CPI SFTP sender adapter unable to read the files where filename having multiple dots
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

CPI Sender SFTP was polling successfully but not picking any files even though there are files available in the source directory. All configuration are fine. 

The filename format was: "test.xyz.abc.xyz.xml" 

Filenam having multiple dots in it. we tested to place some dummy file name: "test.xml". This is got picked but not the remaing files having the multiple dots in it.

Hoping for you answers to resolve my issue.

Thanks,

ramesh

entry.title: Error in intgration CPI-Successfactors using OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion
entry.content:
OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion configuration

We are setting up OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion connection, but when we are configuring the Iflow, the system is sending the error message: Please provide valid login credentials.

Step 1

Key Pair configuration

Step 2

Download certificate

Step 3

Client application configuration in SuccessFactors

Step 4

OAuth2 SAML Bearer Assertion Configuration

Step 5

Iflow configuration

When I click in connect, the system is sending the error

It's a permissions issue?

Do you know how to solve this issue?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Dynamic file naming in TPM AS2 Receiver
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have got a requirement to incorporate message ID of Step 3 - Receiver Communication Flow V2 as a dynamic filename in AS2 Receiver channel of TPM.

Can anyone provide me the solution on how the message ID of the particular iflow can be called as camel header and how the same can be set in TPM as AS2 receiver dynamic filename.

 

Thanks,

Aditya

entry.title: SAP CPI Connectivity issue OAuth 2.0 with Salesforce REST API using a Rojo Adapter
entry.content:
We're trying to connect to Salesforce from SAP CPI using salesforce sender adapter in QA environment, but we're getting the below error from Salesforce and iflow is not getting deployed. All the IP whitelisting and everything is done from Salesforce side. We have tried doing a workaround by maintaining the Salesforce dev credentials in SAP CPI QA environment and iflow got deployed but using the Salesforce QA credentials we're not able to deploy the iflow. Please suggest can anything be done from SAP CPI side to rectify/fix the issue. We're using BasicAuthentication and Oauth Credential name and Secure token Alias for authentication.


[CONTENT][CONTENT_DEPLOY][RuntimeError] : {"message":"EXCEPTION","parameters":["org.apache.camel.CamelException: org.apache.camel.CamelException: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?> <array> <error>invalid_grant</error> <error_description>authentication failure</error_description> </array> "],"childMessageInstances":[{"message":"CAUSE","parameters":["org.apache.camel.CamelException: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?> <array> <error>invalid_grant</error> <error_description>authentication failure</error_description> </array> "]}]}

entry.title: SAP CPI - Receive http request with multipart/forrm-data on CPI
entry.content:
I try to send a http request from SAP ERP system to CPI with multiple files using Content-type multipart/form-data. On CPI i want to extract them as multiple attachments with a groovy script.

But I always end up with “No Attachments”. Therefore I suspect that the function message.getAttachments() is not correct.

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message

def Message processData(Message message) {
def attachments = message.getAttachments()

if (attachments == null || attachments.isEmpty()) {
messageLog.addAttachmentAsString("No Attachments", "No attachments found in the message.", "text/plain")
println "No Attachments"

return message
}

attachments.each { attachment ->
// message.setBody(attachment.getcontent())
}
return message
}

Test with client Postman

entry.title: How to Access SAP Cloud ALM Demo Server via Trial Environment?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to access the SAP Cloud ALM demo server, but it seems that my user ID does not currently have access to the trial server.

Could anyone please guide me on how to gain access to the SAP Cloud ALM demo server or let me know if there are any specific steps I need to follow to set it up? Any insights or assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Pooja Arjun
SAP Cloud ALMSAP Integration Strategy #SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: How to do the Encoding Conversion by using Groovy?
entry.content:
Hello  Experts,

I am now trying to implement a script in SAP Integration Suite, Cloud Integration. (Used to be SAP CPI)

The scenario I am trying to realize is the encoding conversion between Shift_JIS and UTF-8. 

I am thinking that users can just specify "Convert From" and "Convert To", and the script will do the conversion.

 

Here's the code that I wrote. However, when I did the experiment, for some reason my original file was deleted and there's no new file generate.

Could someone kindly help with how I can write the script?

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets
import java.nio.charset.Charset

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // User-editable variables
    def convertFrom = "UTF-8"  // Set this to either "UTF-8" or "Shift_JIS"
    def convertTo = "Shift_JIS"  // Set this to either "UTF-8" or "Shift_JIS"

    println("Starting charset conversion from ${convertFrom} to ${convertTo}")

    // Validate and normalize charset names
    convertFrom = normalizeCharsetName(convertFrom)
    convertTo = normalizeCharsetName(convertTo)
    
    // Get the body as a byte array to preserve the original encoding
    def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[])
    println("Original body size: ${bodyBytes.length} bytes")
    
    // Perform the conversion
    def convertedBytes = convertCharset(bodyBytes, convertFrom, convertTo)
    println("Converted body size: ${convertedBytes.length} bytes")
    
    // Set the converted byte array as the new body
    message.setBody(convertedBytes)
    
    // Set the output charset
    message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", convertTo)
    
    println("Conversion complete. Headers: ${message.getHeaders()}")
    
    return message
}

def String normalizeCharsetName(String charset) {
    switch (charset.toLowerCase()) {
        case "utf-8": return "UTF-8"
        case "utf8": return "UTF-8"
        case "shift-jis": return "Shift_JIS"
        case "shift_jis": return "Shift_JIS"
        case "shiftjis": return "Shift_JIS"
        case "sjis": return "Shift_JIS"
        default: 
            println("ERROR: Unsupported charset: ${charset}")
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported charset: " + charset)
    }
}

def byte[] convertCharset(byte[] input, String fromCharset, String toCharset) {
    if (fromCharset == toCharset) {
        println("No conversion needed, charsets are the same")
        return input
    }
    
    try {
        Charset sourceCharset = Charset.forName(fromCharset)
        Charset targetCharset = Charset.forName(toCharset)
        
        String decodedString = new String(input, sourceCharset)
        byte[] result = decodedString.getBytes(targetCharset)
        
        println("Conversion successful: ${fromCharset} to ${toCharset}")
        return result
    } catch (Exception e) {
        println("ERROR: Error during conversion: ${e.message}")
        throw new RuntimeException("Error during charset conversion", e)
    }
}

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Signavio integration using Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you please let us know if there are any standard adapters available to integrate SAP Signavio using Cloud Integration(Integration Suite).. or what all is needed from SAP Signavio side like API, or are there any standard APIs available to integrate SAP Signavio ingestions? Thank you!

Regards

Ramu

entry.title: how to read field with namespace error Undeclared namespace prefix
entry.content:
hello everyone,

i need to read the content of the "test" field with namespace via content modifier

this is the xml:

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
  <soap:Header>
    <wsse:Security soap:mustUnderstand="1" xmlns:wsse="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd"/>
  </soap:Header>
  <soap:Body>
    <n0:invoke xmlns="http://cxf.component.camel.apache.org/">
      <n0:test>string</n0:test>
    </n0:invoke>
  </soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

 

I entered the namespace in the "namespace mapping" section

 

 

 

 

 

 

i tried also this:

Content modifier:

 

after a test via Postman, I immediately get the following error:

Undeclared namespace prefix "n0"

 

 

how can i do it?
thank you

entry.title: Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance iflow-key
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to subscribe to delete a service key of Process Integration Runtime in my trial environment. I am getting the below error:

Service broker failed to delete service binding for instance <key-name>: Service broker error: Service broker it-broker-rt failed with: Internal Server Error
Does anybody have any idea on this?

entry.title: eDocument cockpit -> CPI -> ANAF response message error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We want to connect the eDocument to the Romanian tax authorities (ANAF) through the CPI middleware. Three calls are necessary for this, all this calls worked. In these calls, we receive the DownloadID, UploadID, and a ZIP file from ANAF in the third call.

We are unsure how to create the response for the eDocument. The edoccockpit does not return any errors:

So nothing is being processed and the transaction is still listed as "RED status" We are using this service consumer, and I suspect that the issue lies with the "EncodedZippedResponse" field.

The ZIP file contains two files. My question is:

Should I convert the whole ZIP file to Base64 and send it back to the eDocument? Or should I unpack it first and  send only parts of the ZIP file? Does anyone have experience with this topic?

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Sequence Data API in SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How Can we Fetch Sequence data via API from SuccessFactors.

I treid to check in Odata Api Data Dictionary and SAP Business Accelerator hub, but no luck.

Could you please help me identify the API.

Thankyou,

Anil
